# Q3 Pricing Decision — Derived from Planning Call

**Team decision recorded in planning call, 2026-06-28.**

## Pricing changes effective Q4

- **Pro tier**: moving from $19/mo to $24/mo
- **Annual plan**: new tier at $230/yr (equivalent to ~$19.17/mo; two months free vs. monthly)
- **Signup grant**: $3 incentive unchanged

## Rationale

Gross margin on Pro is thin post-model-cost increase. Annual plan targets the 90-day churn cliff — the data shows churn drops sharply past 90 days, so incentivizing annual commitment should improve retention and LTV.

## Context

See `operation/memory/competitor-scan.md` for Q3 competitive landscape (Competitor A ~$29/mo, B $15–$40/mo depending on tier, C usage-based).
input.message: derive and place Q3 pricing decision from raw planning-call dump
